registered_by: Fable 5 (max reasoning) synthesis agent, E-market v2
frozen_before: any POST-CUTOFF (2026-02-01+) evaluation of any variant
basis: v1 null result (0/7), DEV sanity run (pre-cutoff, results/gate_dev.json), prior literature on signal decay, and the measured permutation-null spread (~1.5-2 annualized Sharpe on ~105 days)
gate: PASS = net LS Sharpe > 0 AND within-date gross permutation p < 0.05, 10 bps/side, POST window only

predictions.claim: 0 of 4 SOLO family variants PASS the full gate on POST
FULL model does not PASS the gate on POST
SOLO_PEAD has the highest net Sharpe among the four SOLO variants on POST
At least 3 of 5 non-PEAD variants (FULL + SOLO_SLL, SOLO_PEER, SOLO_REV, plus DROP_PEAD) have negative net Sharpe on POST
Drop-one ablation shows PEAD with positive marginal contribution: DROP_PEAD net Sharpe < FULL net Sharpe on POST

Meta: the POST permutation null gross-Sharpe std lands in [1.0, 2.5] annualized, i.e. only edges with true annualized Sharpe >~2 are detectable at p<0.05 in 5 months — the experiment is underpowered for realistically-sized (<1 Sharpe) cross-sectional edges
